runTitle: Vercel AI Assistant quality evaluation - feature surface, streaming, and answer quality
coveredSurfaces: AI feature navigation exposes AI Chat, Reporter Agent, and Analyst Agent
Starter prompts render for server status, incident analysis, prediction, report generation, and vision analysis
System Context provider routing renders Groq, Cerebras, Mistral, and Gemini configured states
System Context AI Engine resolves Online in production
Authenticated stream prompt 1 returns 200 SSE with tool-call/tool-result/text events
Prompt 1 answer grounds total server counts: 18 total, 17 normal, 1 warning, 0 emergency/offline
Prompt 1 answer identifies a specific high-attention server and metric trend
Authenticated stream prompt 2 returns 200 SSE with CPU ranking answer
Prompt 2 answer ranks top CPU servers with current percentages
X-AI timing headers present on both prompts (192ms and 143ms)
Browser console during AI evaluation had 0 errors; only repeated CSS preload warnings
skippedSurfaces: Cloud Run admin /monitoring and /monitoring/traces direct run.app checks
Profile menu accessibility fix verification on Vercel because the local code change is not deployed yet

aiLatencyObservations.source: authenticated browser stream headers and full SSE read
authenticated browser stream headers and full SSE read

expertAssessments.rationale: AI Assistant is functional, streams with tool evidence, and returns grounded operational summaries. However, prompt 1 requested two immediate actions and received one combined recommendation, and prompt 2 drifted from CPU-specific diagnosis into memory/resource-upgrade guidance.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Tune answer-quality instructions so enumerated user requirements are satisfied exactly and CPU recommendations stay metric-specific.

expertAssessments.rationale: Both production stream requests exposed X-AI timing headers, Cloud Run source, ui-message-stream protocol, and observable event phases including tool-call/tool-result/text events.
The evaluation used a bounded production Playwright MCP flow with two real prompts, durable evidence, and explicit skipped surfaces to avoid unnecessary provider calls.

The AI answer included resource upgrade language for a CPU ranking prompt. For this project, first-line recommendations should prefer investigation, process isolation, load distribution, caching, or config tuning before scale-up language.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Adjust production AI guidance to avoid premature resource-upgrade recommendations.

usageChecks.summary: vercel usage --format json --non-interactive reviewed before AI quality QA record; effective usage was 15.0518 USD while billed amount remained 0.0000 USD.

pendingImprovements.title: AI 답변이 사용자가 요청한 항목 개수를 정확히 충족하도록 보강
pendingImprovements.note: Prompt 1 requested 즉시 조치 2개 but production answer returned one combined recommendation. Release-blocking 아님; answer quality tracking item.

pendingImprovements.title: AI 운영 권고에서 리소스 업그레이드보다 조사/캐시/분산 조치를 우선
pendingImprovements.note: Prompt 2 CPU ranking answer included memory check/resource upgrade language. Recommendations should stay metric-specific and free-tier aligned. Release-blocking 아님; answer quality tracking item.

notes: Overall AI quality score: 4/5. Functional availability 5/5, streaming observability 5/5, tool grounding 4/5, instruction following 3/5, operational actionability 4/5, free-tier fit 3/5.
Profile menu accessibility improvement was implemented and locally validated with unit/type/lint/test:quick, but not verified on Vercel production because deployment was not performed in this turn.
Console warnings were repeated next/static CSS preload warnings only; browser console errors were 0 during AI evaluation.
